project_type: Python cognitive agent prototype with concept formation, economy routing, and evaluation system
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, no external dependencies required at runtime
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory, run via ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python -m pytest tests/
verification_instructions: 1. Run import check to confirm no syntax errors. 2. Run pytest to confirm all tests pass. 3. Run the v6 eval runner to confirm new perturbation operators work end-to-end.
setup_instructions: Project is pure Python with no external deps. Use ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python. Install in dev mode: pip install -e .[dev]
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Use ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python for all execution. Project uses @dataclass(slots=True) requiring Python 3.10+. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: All documentation MUST be in Arabic following existing style. Every new mechanism/operator/algorithm MUST document its 'Legitimate Theft' source using the template: '## X.XX من [SOURCE] / ما الذي أخذناه؟ / ما الذي لم نأخذه الآن؟ / ماذا أصبح عندنا؟'. Current branch is feat/stabilize-and-package-v2. Create new branch from current HEAD.
key_patterns: Perturbation operators follow pattern: take TaskCase, return new TaskCase via clone_case(). Eval runners use compare_conditions() with CONDITIONS dict. Reports are in eval/reports/ and return dicts. Anomaly runtime extracts candidates from task_result dicts. Economy router uses choose_tier() taking TaskObject+BlackboardObject+BlackboardMemoryPack. Verification uses verify_output() with family markers and property/shortcut checks.
directory_structure: virtual_genesis/core/objects/ - data classes. virtual_genesis/runtime/ - runtime services (anomaly, verification, economy, pipeline, etc). virtual_genesis/eval/ - evaluation system (perturbations/, task_sets/, runners/, reports/). tests/ - pytest tests. Root .md files - Arabic documentation.
